applicationRollbacks.dialogDescription: Configure how rollbacks work for this application
applicationRollbacks.storageAlert: Having rollbacks enabled increases storage usage. Be careful with this option. Note that manually cleaning the cache may delete rollback images, making them unavailable for future rollbacks.
applicationRollbacks.enableRollbacksDescription: Allow rolling back to previous deployments
applicationRollbacks.noRegistriesDescriptionRich: No registries available. Please <link>configure a registry</link> first to enable rollbacks.
applicationRollbacks.registryDescription: Select a registry where rollback images will be stored.

validation.registryRequiredWhenEnabled: Registry is required when rollbacks are enabled
